title: Updated Title
content: Python is an interpreted, high-level, general-purpose programming language. Its design philosophy emphasizes code readability with the use of significant indentation.

title: The Benefits of REST API
content: REST (Representational State Transfer) is an architectural style for distributed hypermedia systems. It allows scalable communication between client and server via HTTP protocol.

title: Docker for Beginners
content: Docker is an open source platform that automates the deployment of applications inside software containers, providing an additional layer of abstraction and automation.

title: Machine Learning vs Deep Learning
content: Although often used interchangeably, Deep Learning is a subset of Machine Learning that uses multi-layered artificial neural networks to solve complex problems.

title: Cloud Security
content: Cloud computing security involves a broad set of policies, technologies, and controls deployed to protect data, applications, and the associated infrastructure.
